rows.label: tev025601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ornela about the people of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0001
rows.name:
We've had a lot to chew on, that's for damn
sure. First the Earth's demise, then a long,
lonely voyage on the White Whale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0002
rows.name:
And now, an unknown planet full of indigens and xenos
is trying to wipe us out. They were right when they
called the Exodus a "project." It feels like one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Some folks are strong enough to stay upbeat,
but let's face it—we're human. Not everyone
has been taking the transition so well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0004
rows.name:
I know it's taken its toll on me. If I didn't have
a good friend like Himeri to keep me going, I would
have given up long ago. But hey, here I am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm sure you've got your share of worries as well.
If it ever feels like too much, come talk to me
or Himeri, okay? That's what we're here for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0011
rows.name:
I noticed that Himeri really
blossoms around you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oh, she's all smiles around the
rest of us, but sometimes I think
it's just to make us feel better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0013
rows.name:
But with you, she doesn't seem to try quite so hard.
She just looks more...relaxed, I guess? Maybe because
you're a BLADE and you understand her. I don't know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Either way, I'm glad she has
you. Stick by her for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hey, Himeri. Welcome back! Any
injuries? How are you holding up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Everything's under control here, so you
just focus on what's on your plate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Thank you, Ornela. I promise
I'll take care of everyone's
problems when I get back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0022
rows.name:
I know I'm doubling your workload in the
meantime. I pray you can forgive me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Oh, please. I wouldn't have signed
up if I didn't enjoy the work. Feel
free to ride me like a rented mule![ST:wait ]
